name: Ansh Madaan
education: B.Tech, Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology (2023 - Present)

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a hybrid CNN-LSTM with attention model achieving 97% accuracy with subject-wise validation and improved interpretability using Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a secure chatbot access system using real-time face recognition and conversational AI for personalized interaction.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a voice-controlled terminal enabling shell operations via natural language and Google's generative AI models, published as a PyPI package.
